diversity_better_bundle.config.bundle_en: - Add 2 enchantment for bundle (refill and capacity).
diversity_better_bundle.config.bundle_pl:
- Switch to place mode by holding bundle and shift-leftclick to the ground.
- Then you can place block that inside the bundle.
diversity_better_bundle.config.cancel.to: Exit Config Screen without saving any changes.
diversity_better_bundle.config.default.t: Reset this field to it's default value.
diversity_better_bundle.config.easy_shul:
- EasyShulkerBoxes compatibility layer for bundles.
- Allow capacity enchantment to work with this mod.
diversity_better_bundle.config.enchancem:
- Enchancement compatibility layer for bundles modules.
- Allow bundle enchantments to work with this mod.
diversity_better_bundle.config.require_r: ⚠ This feature requires restarting the game to apply the changes.
diversity_better_bundle.config.reset.too: Reset all options to their default, can be undo.
diversity_better_bundle.config.title: Diversity's Better Bundle Configs
diversity_better_bundle.config.undo.tool: Revert all options to their pre-edit state.
enchantment.diversity_better_bundle.refi: Grants the bundle the ability to automatically refill items from the user's inventory when they run out while placing.
enchantment.diversity_better_bundle.sele: Bundle automatically sucks newly picked-up items, but only those already inside.
enchantment.diversity_better_bundle.vacu: Bundle automatically sucks newly picked-up items.
